title: RoleDef
description: A role members of a group can fill (ch04 §4.6, HZD Part 2). Slot limits are the whole mechanism: the herd's core/ring structure is emergent from "2 watchers, everyone else grazes" — no formation code.

description.description: One line for humans and LLMs (surfaced by the manifest).

inherits.description: Parent def ID (same kind); objects deep-merge, scalars override, arrays replace or take {"$append"/"$remove"} patches.

slots.description: How many members may hold this role at once.

condition.description: Manual condition set on assignees (must exist in their catalog), e.g. "ROLE_WATCHER".

ringRadius.description: When set, assignees get a "post_position" belief on a ring of this radius around the group centroid, evenly spaced by slot index — structure from slots, not scripts.
